nasb.text: Then your houses shall be filled and the houses of all your servants and the houses of all the Egyptians, something which neither your fathers nor your grandfathers have seen, from the day that they came upon the earth until this day.’ ” And he turned and went out from Pharaoh.

esv.text: and they shall fill your houses and the houses of all your servants and of all the Egyptians, as neither your fathers nor your grandfathers have seen, from the day they came on earth to this day.’” Then he turned and went out from Pharaoh.

cnv.text: 蝗蟲必充滿了你的宮殿，你所有臣僕的房屋，和所有埃及人的房屋；這是你祖宗和你祖宗的祖宗自從在世以來，直到今日，所沒有見過的。’”摩西就轉身，離開法老出去了。

ccb.text: 你的王宫及臣仆和所有埃及人的房屋都要布满蝗虫，这是你祖祖辈辈从未见过的蝗灾。’”摩西说完，便转身离开法老。
